changed.description: Renamed RSA and digest enum values to lowerCamelCase to satisfy the constant_identifier_names lint rule.
Modernized all part-of directives to use URI syntax and updated the library directive to be unnamed.
Applied use_super_parameters across IV, Key, RSA, and RSASigner classes.

fixed.description: Fixed 42 analyzer lint issues, including the use of null-aware assignment operators in Fernet and Key.stretch, and escaping angle brackets in doc comments.
